task: Keep the inspect JSON contract stable on the common-indicator baseline fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"record_count\"] == 5; assert data[\"records\"][1][\"kind\"] == \"descriptor\"; assert data[\"records\"][1][\"label\"] == \"form\"; assert data[\"records\"][3][\"kind\"] == \"module\"; assert data[\"records\"][4][\"kind\"] == \"form\"; assert data[\"records\"][4][\"size_policy\"] == \"mirror\""'
notes: Direct CLI contract check for inspect metadata on the smallest baseline fixture.

task: Keep CLI unpack/pack byte-identical on the common-indicator baseline fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" && uv run formbin pack "$tmpdir/unpack" -o "$tmpdir/repacked.Form.bin" && cmp -s tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin "$tmpdir/repacked.Form.bin"'
notes: End-to-end CLI confirmation for unpack and pack on the baseline fixture.
